response.global_analysis: The video features a two-song medley. The first song, 'Star Star Start', does not match the reference lyrics provided in the JSON (different verse), so I am relying on the audio and on-screen text. The second song, 'Lyrical Monster', matches the reference song but features modified lyrics for the live performance (e.g., 'Riri's smile' instead of 'Commander'). Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio. On-screen text was used to confirm song titles and specific terms like 'Hashutagu #Hako'.
